response: Charles A. Agemian had more career changes than Arshile Gorky. Agemian retired from Chase Manhattan Bank early and became chairman and CEO of Hackensack Trust Co., later renamed Garden State National Bank. In contrast, Arshile Gorky was a prominent figure in the Abstract Expressionist movement, known for his influence on the movement and his own career as an artist. While Gorky did change roles and directions in his career, his career was more focused on artistic development and recognition rather than significant corporate or professional transitions.
